description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Simplifies the docs experience around a refreshed Quickstart so the main onboarding path is easier to follow.
- Removes older docs pages and tutorials in favor of a leaner, more focused docs surface.
Fixes & polish
- Refreshes docs metadata and site structure to match the slimmer documentation set.
- Updates tracked download stats for 2026-03-23.
- Ships version 0.11.184 across the app, desktop, orchestrator, server, and opencode-router packages.
Packaging / ops
- Publishes desktop artifacts for macOS, Linux, and Windows from the Release App workflow.
- Publishes the matching openwork-orchestrator sidecar release for this version.
Compare:
https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.183...v0.11.184
